steps.title: Identify what initially measured means
steps.content: The phrase initially measured refers to the starting point in time. Since $x$ represents hours after the initial measurement, the initial time corresponds to $x = 0$.

steps.title: Substitute x = 0 into the equation
steps.content:
When $x = 0$:
$$y = 3600(a)^0$$
By the zero exponent rule, any positive number to the power 0 equals 1:
$$(a)^0 = 1$$
Therefore:
$$y = 3600 \cdot 1 = 3600$$
The predicted initial number of bacteria was 3600.
